ODDMELT-CORRODED_RIBBON.title: Corroded Ribbon
ODDMELT-CORRODED_RIBBON.flavor: A miraculous survivor of the disposal process, the last remaining keepsake of a life never lived.
ODDMELT-CORRODED_RIBBON.description: Attacks deal [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] additional damage to debuffed enemies.
ODDMELT-IMPURE_COIL.title: Impure Coil
ODDMELT-IMPURE_COIL.flavor: The vile substance, now in harmony with its container.
ODDMELT-IMPURE_COIL.description: Attacks deal [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] additional damage for each debuff enemies have.
